nodes.title: DoTDamage.ts
nodes.summary: Damage-over-Time (DoT) calculation engine providing tick damage formulas, potency scaling, Caustic Slow computation, and builder-to-game value conversion for Bleed, Burn, and Poison debuffs.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module using `as const` tuple pattern for DotType union, `Record<>` for lookup maps, and `ReadonlyArray` for the type list.

nodes.title: Perkbasedmg.ts
nodes.summary: Central perk damage definition registry. Defines interfaces (PerkDmgCtx, HpGate, SecondaryEffect, PerkDmgDef), HP-gate activation logic, and the PERK_DMG_DEFS array containing 30+ perk damage definitions with base damage formulas, damage types, scaling modes, hit counts, proc coefficients, secondary effects, and activation conditions.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with extensive interface definitions, exported constant arrays of typed object literals, conditional function callbacks, and a large PERK_DMG_DEFS array serving as a declarative damage registry.

nodes.title: draconicColorEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Draconic color (element) attack stat definitions. Maps six draconic colors (fire, air, earth, water, holy, hex) to their associated damage multipliers, speed modifiers, stun effects, and special passive abilities via the DRACONIC_COLOR_ATTACK_STATS array.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module using interface for typed stat objects and a Map-based lookup pattern for O(1) access by color name.

nodes.title: raceEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Race-conditional effect definitions and utility functions. Implements the Human below-50%-HP passive (damage boost + DR) and the Ork Tenacity system that calculates bonus damage based on the count of active non-debuff, non-neutral buffs.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with generic type parameters (T extends ...) for buff filtering, using HpGate from Perkbasedmg and isHpGateActive for threshold checks.

nodes.title: dot-damage.ts
nodes.summary: Pure constants module for Damage-over-Time formulas. Exports 14 numeric constants defining base damage, scaling values, potency limits, rounding precision, and builder-to-game conversion factors used by the DoT calculation engine.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module exporting only `const` numeric literals. No functions or classes. Serves as a centralized tuning spreadsheet for all DoT formulas.

nodes.title: getDotBase
nodes.summary: Computes the flat base damage of a DoT tick before potency multiplier. Formula: DOT_BASE_DAMAGE × (1 + inflictionPotency / DOT_INFLICTION_DIVISOR).

nodes.title: getDotPotencyMult
nodes.summary: Computes the potency multiplier for a DoT tick. Formula: (1 + dotPotency)^(1 + min(DOT_POTENCY_POWER_CAP, dotPotency)). Exponent caps at 2 when dotPotency ≥ 1.0.

nodes.title: calcDotTick
nodes.summary: Computes a single DoT tick damage value by combining base damage (getDotBase) with potency multiplier (getDotPotencyMult) and rounding to DOT_ROUND_FACTOR precision.

nodes.title: calcCausticSlow
nodes.summary: Computes Caustic Slow tick damage. Converts builder-display Poison Potency to game value, applies the base DoT formula, then multiplies by a slow-duration bonus (1 + slowDuration × DOT_SLOW_MULT_PER_SECOND).

nodes.title: toGamePotency
nodes.summary: Converts a builder-display perk value to the game-internal value by multiplying by DOT_BUILDER_TO_GAME (0.1).

nodes.title: calcDotDisplayPotency
nodes.summary: Computes the effective DoT display potency for a debuff, applying the Endless Despair (ED) modifier when the player has the perk. ED scales potency by (1 + 0.35 × edAmt) + 0.1.

nodes.title: gateThreshold
nodes.summary: Resolves the effective HP threshold from an HpGate. Returns undefined (always active) if the perk amount meets the alwaysActiveAtPerkAmount, otherwise delegates to getThreshold or returns the static hpThreshold.

nodes.title: isHpGateActive
nodes.summary: Determines whether an HpGate is currently active given the player's HP fill percentage and perk amount. Returns true if no gate or always-active; otherwise checks above/below threshold.

nodes.title: calcSpringblastBaseDamage
nodes.summary: Computes the total Springblast base damage given a perk amount. Formula: (SPRINGBLAST_BASE_HIT + SPRINGBLAST_PER_STACK_HIT × perkAmount) × (1 + SPRINGBLAST_MULT_PER_STACK × perkAmount).

nodes.title: PERK_DMG_DEFS
nodes.summary: Declarative array of 30+ PerkDmgDef objects defining every perk's damage behavior: base damage formula, damage types, stat scalings, hit counts, proc coefficients, secondary effects (DR, heals, debuffs), HP gates, and activation conditions. Covers Springblast, Basic/Buni/Mageling/Toadzerker/Dire Buni/Void Root/Bomber Spirit, Bounce Momentum, Bomber Charge, Protector Spirit, Air Pressure/Barrier, Apollo Boost, Dragon Claw/Bubble, Roaring Heads, Barbed Flurry, Honey Arts, Sickness, Melting Slime, Whirlwind, Dragon State, Volatile Shell, Spore Burst, Royal Finisher, Grounded Despair, Echo Incineration, Bombardier, Venom Spitter, Cauterize, Steam Charge, Quarry, Wind Drill, and Fiery Pursuit.

nodes.title: getDraconicColorDmgMultiplier
nodes.summary: Returns the damage multiplier for a given draconic color from the DRACONIC_COLOR_MAP. Defaults to 1 if the color is not found.

nodes.title: DRACONIC_COLOR_ATTACK_STATS
nodes.summary: Array of 6 DraconicColorAttackStats objects defining the stat bonuses for each draconic color: fire (speed + burn), air (speed + knockback + cooldown), earth (damage + stun + speed), water (damage + speed + stun + heal/cleanse), holy (heal), hex (stun + weakness + random debuffs).

nodes.title: getActiveRaceEffect
nodes.summary: Finds and returns the active RaceConditionalEffect for a given race name and HP fill percentage, using isHpGateActive to check threshold conditions.

nodes.title: getOrkTenacityBuffs
nodes.summary: Filters a buff list to return only those buffs that count toward Ork Tenacity: non-debuff, non-self-debuff, and non-neutral buffs. Uses buff definition metadata for classification.

nodes.title: calcOrkTenacityBonus
nodes.summary: Calculates the Ork Tenacity bonus as 0.1 per qualifying buff. Uses getOrkTenacityBuffs to count active buffs, then multiplies by ORK_TENACITY_PER_BUFF.

nodes.title: DOT_BASE_DAMAGE
nodes.summary: Base damage constant for DoT ticks (1.75).

nodes.title: DOT_BUILDER_TO_GAME
nodes.summary: Conversion factor from builder-display potency to game-internal potency (0.1). Builder value 5 → game value 0.5.

edges.label: uses in Dragon Claw/Bubble secondary effects
provides color stats consumed by Perkbasedmg
extends HpGate system with race-specific logic
DoT potency functions used in perk damage formulas (Cauterize, Spore Burst)
